banner.title: We'd love to hear from you.
banner.subtitle: For reservations, private events or simply a question — we reply personally.

map.title: 248 Larkspur Avenue.
map.subtitle: On the quiet southern edge of the Mission, two blocks from the Larkspur tram stop.

directions.label: By car
directions.value: Complimentary valet Thursday — Saturday from 5:00 PM. Municipal lot one block north.

directions.label: By transit
directions.value: J-line to Larkspur & 24th, three minute walk south.

directions.label: By foot
directions.value: The room is on the ground floor of the converted Larkspur Press building.
